channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: New & Notable: Guitarist and singer Jane Getter leads an all…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: Guitarist and singer Jane Getter leads an all-star team of prog players with ties to Miles Davis, Chic, David Byrne, and others.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Guitarist and singer Jane Getter leads an all-star team of prog players with ties to Miles Davis, Chic, David Byrne, and others.

item.title: Here’s what’s hot this week on Record Club. These are curren…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
Here’s what’s hot this week on Record Club. These are currently the six most reviewed, queued, and discussed albums on the platform.

For a longer list of what’s popular this week, head to record.club today!
item.content:encoded:
Here’s what’s hot this week on Record Club. These are currently the six most reviewed, queued, and discussed albums on the platform.

For a longer list of what’s popular this week, head to record.club today!

item.title: 大森元貴 映画「白鳥とコウモリ」主題歌担当 松村北斗と今田美桜ダブル主演の 東野圭吾ミステリー🦢🦇 …

item.title: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop al…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop album featuring WILLOW. Arc Iris have never been afraid to build something grandiose and weird.
item.content:encoded: A backyard venue. A sci-fi ballet. An apocalyptic art-pop album featuring WILLOW. Arc Iris have never been afraid to build something grandiose and weird.

item.title: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time sinc…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament. n.pr/4yEysF9
item.content:encoded: Spain is back in the World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament. n.pr/4yEysF9

item.title: What's it like to grow up and learn in the age of AI? NPR pu…

item.content:encoded: What's it like to grow up and learn in the age of AI? NPR put that question to seven teenagers across the country. n.pr/4yr2LPq

item.title: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urge…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR. n.pr/4wNTAqF
item.content:encoded: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR. n.pr/4wNTAqF

item.title: New & Notable: UK producer takes on songs by The Cleaners Fr…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: UK producer takes on songs by The Cleaners From Venus, Dogbowl, Dan Jones, and others, with assistance from the original artists throughout.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: UK producer takes on songs by The Cleaners From Venus, Dogbowl, Dan Jones, and others, with assistance from the original artists throughout.

item.title: An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the f…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the fire that destroyed Tomorrowland’s Mainstage ahead of last year’s festival, according to a report by Het Laatste Nieuws

buff.ly/XQjtkus
item.content:encoded:
An accidental ethanol spill may have been the cause of the fire that destroyed Tomorrowland’s Mainstage ahead of last year’s festival, according to a report by Het Laatste Nieuws

buff.ly/XQjtkus

item.title: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty an…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty and the Beat,' and made history as the first and only No. 1 Billboard album by an all-female band who wrote their own material and played their own instruments.
item.content:encoded: 45 years ago, Go-Go's released their debut album, 'Beauty and the Beat,' and made history as the first and only No. 1 Billboard album by an all-female band who wrote their own material and played their own instruments.

item.title: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.
item.content:encoded: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.

item.title: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing. n.pr/4wCwMd9
item.content:encoded: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing. n.pr/4wCwMd9

item.content:encoded: Listen to Brighton indie rockers Penelope Isles' wooly, expansive new tune "I Loved You, Robert Pattinson"

item.title: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm." A musical thought process that feels glitchy, crackly, and Radiophonic, rumbling occasionally into the hinterlands of Aphex Twin.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm." A musical thought process that feels glitchy, crackly, and Radiophonic, rumbling occasionally into the hinterlands of Aphex Twin.

item.title: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike. n.pr/4ppzdxA
item.content:encoded: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike. n.pr/4ppzdxA

item.content:encoded:
s**t kingzとこっちのけんとがコラボ
新曲「ともパン」リリース🍞

item.title: The visa process for visiting artists has always been compli…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse. n.pr/4gz1mzP
